description: Maps model-router model IDs to actual API model identifiers. Updated 2026-03-04.
note: The model-router.json uses canonical names. This file maps them to real API endpoints.

openai/gpt-5.2.notes: gpt-5.2 is aspirational — using gpt-4o as current best reasoning model

openai/gpt-5.2-pro.notes: No distinct pro tier exists yet — maps to gpt-4o with higher token budget

openai/gpt-5.2-codex.notes: Codex-style model — using gpt-4o for code tasks

openai/gpt-5-mini.notes: Primary economy workhorse — fast, cheap, good for structured tasks

openai/gpt-5-nano.notes: Nano tier maps to gpt-4o-mini — no distinct nano model exists

anthropic/claude-opus-4-1.notes: Best reasoning model — use for orchestration, complex research, high-risk decisions

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514.notes: Best writing model — use for drafting, review, tone-sensitive tasks

anthropic/claude-3-5-haiku-latest.notes: Fast screening model — good for validation, classification, quick checks

ollama/qwen2.5:7b.notes: Local fallback — requires Ollama running locally

recommendations.udrzbar: Economy tier is correct — structured CRM tasks don't need expensive models. gpt-4o-mini handles JSON well.
recommendations.planovac: Economy tier is correct — calendar planning is template-driven.
recommendations.postak: Standard tier justified — writing quality matters for email. Sonnet is the right choice.
recommendations.strateg: Standard/Premium justified — research needs breadth and reasoning. Opus for lead, sonnet for workers.
recommendations.kontrolor: Standard tier correct — validation needs reasoning but not creative writing.
recommendations.archivar: Economy tier correct — summarization and sync are well-suited to smaller models.
recommendations.main: Standard tier correct — Spojka orchestration needs good reasoning for routing decisions.
